entries.problem: Piper TTS not pre-loaded when SNAC succeeds — speak_fast() fails silently
entries.fix: Always call get_piper() at startup regardless of SNAC status
entries.lesson: speak_fast() depends on Piper regardless of Orpheus availability

entries.problem: Dashboard shows EVO/Voice as inactive despite services running — status used voice overlay visibility (transient) not heartbeat (persistent)
entries.fix: Added last_heartbeat field to VoiceOverlay, evo_online() method with 90s timeout, handle heartbeat SSE events
entries.lesson: Persistent status indicators must use heartbeat data, not transient UI state

entries.problem: Mic bleed-through — Piper TTS played through Pi speaker, picked up by EVO mic, transcribed as garbage by Whisper
entries.fix: speak_fast() and speak() now return audio duration; flush delay = max(duration + 0.5s, 1.5s) before listening resumes
entries.lesson: Audio playback duration must be tracked and mic suppressed for that duration plus margin

entries.problem: No way to capture interaction quality or user feedback for evolution pipeline
entries.fix: Created interaction-log.js — JSONL interaction log with full request/response pairs, reaction-based feedback via Baileys messages.reaction event, correction detection patterns
entries.lesson: Evolution pipeline requires rich quality signals: automated (latency, errors, fallbacks) + human (reactions, corrections)

entries.problem: Ollama API replaced with llama-server OpenAI-compatible API
entries.fix: Created evo-llm.js replacing ollama.js, updated 8 source files, systemd services for 3 llama-servers (main 8080, classifier 8081, TTS 8082)
entries.lesson: OpenAI-compatible API is the right abstraction layer — same format works for any llama-server model
